prompt: A long dark stone corridor. Exactly ten people stand in a perfectly spaced line from right to left, all facing forward in the same direction, all with neutral calm expressions, all with identical posture — arms extended, holding whatever flame they received. Their faces and bodies are identical and emotionless. Only the flame in each person's hands changes. The person on the far right holds a massive roaring torch — tall brilliant orange and gold flames. The second person holds a slightly smaller torch. The third, smaller still. The fourth holds a large candle. The fifth holds a medium candle. The sixth holds a small flickering candle. The seventh holds a matchstick-sized flame. The eighth holds a tiny dying ember, barely glowing red. The ninth holds a completely extinguished blackened stick — no flame, just smoke rising faintly. The tenth person on the far left holds a cold dark unlit stick — nothing, no glow, no smoke, no light whatsoever. The corridor walls reflect exactly this — brilliantly warm golden stone on the right, completely cold dark shadow on the far left. Photorealistic, cinematic, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting. No text, no labels, no diagrams, no symbols, no equations, no floating elements, no annotations. Single frame. Negative prompt: text, labels, numbers, equations, arrows, graphs, neural network, neurons, open mouths, shouting, emotional expressions, gesturing, computers, floating elements, watermark, cartoon
metaphor: Ten people hold flames shrinking from a roaring torch to a dead stick — last few extinguished — mirroring how gradients vanish through deep network layers, freezing early layers.
